mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products(category_id, name, description, tags, price, stock, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{tags}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: UPDATE products SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
